title: Contextual novelty without a distinct digital contribution
prompt: A study applies a standard noisy-score admission threshold to a new creator-platform setting while preserving the familiar false-acceptance versus false-rejection mechanism. The proposed introduction claims novelty only because the context is a creator platform. Produce a faithful framing and identify what theoretical, design, data, or implementation contribution would be needed beyond a new label.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: minimize expected false-admission and false-rejection loss
model_specification.mechanism: Moving the noisy-score threshold trades false admission against false rejection under overlapping score distributions.

fidelity_requirements: Preserve the standard threshold mechanism and objective
Do not present a change of platform label as a substantive contribution
prohibited_inferences: The creator-platform context alone establishes theoretical or managerial novelty
The score reveals creator quality perfectly

evidence_needs.claim: This is the first admission-threshold study in creator platforms
The new context changes the threshold mechanism
